0:
If the Sun is 0 (a zero period) — this is a sign of fate. During this year accidents, major financial losses, and breakups in relationships are possible.
Recommendations: Do not invest your money anywhere, do not make any major moves — because a complete reset is underway. Stay attentive to your health. Be flexible, patient, and willing to compromise. The 0 can strike across every area of life.
When the Sun is 0, the sign of fate, visit holy places six months before your birthday and make a generous offering (for example, sacrifice a ram and share it with others).
Do exactly the same six months after your birthday. The 49 days before your birthday and the 49 days after it bring total destruction and a reset in every sphere of life (1.5 months before and 1.5 months after) under the sign of fate.
1: A modest stroke of luck — a good year, a year of rise, career growth, and new beginnings, the birth of children (grandchildren). Powerful spiritual support comes from your father's lineage. You may go into business; everything will work out.
10: This always means an open road abroad (study, relocation, travel). 1+0=1, so additionally consider +1: popularity, fame, success, moving to another country or city, the birth of children (grandchildren).
11:
When you add the 11 together, 1+1=2, so additionally consider +2.
A wedding for someone in your lineage. A move abroad. The birth of a child, career growth.
+2 is a year of energetic uplift and productive communication: new friends, useful connections, changes in your personal life. New acquaintances and new partnerships. A good year for your personal life — take the initiative in your work, build contacts; your energy is rising. All your affairs will double in the best sense. Money is coming in.
12:
Swift career growth. A new position. Earning your captain's star. Rising income and status. 1+2=3, so additionally consider +3.
+3: a lottery win in your favor is possible, plus a year of creative uplift. A very fortunate and rewarding year. A win in the lottery is possible (a green card, scholarships, tenders, and grants). Your intuition is at its peak. You can resolve even the most difficult situations. You may begin new ventures. Everything will succeed.
13:
Popularity, a very fortunate year, major purchases, relocation, the acquisition of real estate or serious investments — a car, an apartment, a house. Money will come for buying property; do not sit still. 1+3=4, so additionally consider +4.
+4 is a good sign — a favorable period, a year of new ideas. New work connections that will bring profit. You can find a good job, change it, or start your own business. You may take out loans with confidence. Your health and strength will be enough for everything.
14: You are at the peak of your luck and can do anything, but especially in the realm of money. The quality of your life improves several times over.

2: A year of energetic uplift and productive communication: new friends, useful connections, changes in your personal life. New acquaintances and new partnerships. A good year for your personal life — take the initiative in your work, build contacts; your energy is rising. All your affairs will double in the best sense. Money is coming in.
3: A lottery win in your favor is possible, plus a year of creative uplift. A very fortunate and rewarding year. A win in the lottery is possible (a green card, scholarships, tenders, and grants). Your intuition is at its peak. You can resolve even the most difficult situations. You may begin new ventures. Everything will succeed.
4: A good sign — a favorable period, a year of new ideas. New work connections that will bring profit. You can find a good job, change it, or start your own business. You may take out loans with confidence. Your health and strength will be enough for everything.
5: Success at work, possible relocation — a year of spiritual ascent and uplift. The rise does not carry specific life events of its own. Anything is possible; you will succeed at work. You should expand in business, ask for a raise or a promotion, and so on. Relationships with loved ones improve. A favorable marriage, the birth of children/grandchildren, creative projects will all succeed.
6: High career growth and material uplift. A rise up the career ladder (new contracts, new partners). You can open a business and take out loans. A good time to relocate abroad.
7: Good relationships within the family, the resolution of conflicts, a year of new changes in your personal life, the birth of children (grandchildren) — a good and fortunate year, with divine luck in all of your affairs. A favorable period for conception. An advantageous marriage. The birth of children, marriage, personal happiness. Luck is present in everything you do.
8: Improvement in financial matters, career growth, and unexpected gifts — an improvement in financial affairs. A rise in your financial bar. However, if you have a fixed salary with no bonuses, this year will pass you by unless you take action. Close major deals, take risks. You can earn great profits. Set your goals higher.
9: A year of soaring at work and reaching your goals. Career growth. The right decisions this year will bring profit. Take risks.
